# deadlock examples {visibility="hidden"}

## a one-way bridge {visibility="hidden"}

<!-- FIXME: alt text -->

{{< include /deadlock/_example-bridge.qmd >}}

## with locks {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_example-rename.qmd >}}

## with memory {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_example-memory.qmd >}}

## dining philosophers {visibility="hidden"}

### lab next week 


* applying solutions to deadlock to classic <i>dining philosphers</i> problem


{{< include /deadlock/_dining-philosophers.qmd >}}

# deadlock definition {visibility="hidden"}

## short intuition {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_definition-intro.qmd >}}

## conditions for deadlock {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_deadlock-requirements.qmd >}}

# exercise {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_is-deadlock-ex.qmd >}}

# deadlock prevention {visibility="hidden"}

## techniques overview {visibility="hidden"}

### deadlock prevention techniques 
<!-- infinite resources, no shared resources, no waiting -->

::: {.r-stack .my-full}

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}


:::

## example: livelock {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_livelock.qmd >}}

## preventing livelock {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_prevent-livelock.qmd >}}

### deadlock prevention techniques <!-- revoke -->


![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-7.svg)

## example: revoke {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_revocable-locks.qmd >}}

### deadlock prevention techniques <!-- all at once -->

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-6.svg)




### deadlock prevention techniques <!-- consistent order -->

![](/deadlock/texfig/deadlock-prevention-lib.figure-5.svg)

## example: consistent order {visibility="hidden"}

{{< include /deadlock/_prevention-ordering-examples.qmd >}}
